meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome no project ideas. An intermediate-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for fast, scalable builds.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the perfect client brief. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous feature implementation, you can build micro-SaaS products that generate passive income. Focus on solving high-frequency, low-complexity problems for small business owners to ensure recurring revenue with minimal maintenance overhead.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking rhythmically like a taunt. You have the technical skills to build anything, yet you’re trapped in the 'client work' treadmill, trading hours for dollars while your own product ideas remain stagnant. The industry moves fast, and your potential is being diluted by the lack of a repeatable, automated build system.

It’s time to pivot. By treating your own development lifecycle like a product pipeline, you can turn 'no ideas' into a portfolio of passive income assets. We’re moving beyond manual coding; we’re using AI-orchestrated workflows to ship modular, high-value tools that solve real problems while you sleep.

steps.title: Identify Micro-Pain Points
steps.description: Analyze your past client projects to find recurring, tedious tasks. Build a specialized tool that automates one of these bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project history and identify three high-frequency manual tasks that can be converted into a standalone micro-SaaS tool for passive income.

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a production-ready repository structure that includes standard security and deployment configurations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust Next.js boilerplate with Supabase integration, Tailwind CSS, and a built-in Stripe checkout workflow for a subscription-based tool.

steps.title: Autonomous Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the core logic for your tool, focusing on clean, maintainable, and modular code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a modular service that handles incoming webhooks from Stripe and updates user subscription status in the Supabase database.

steps.title: Automated Testing & Edge Cases
steps.description: Ensure your product is robust by having Claude Code generate comprehensive test suites for your primary logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Playwright tests for the user authentication flow and subscription payment process.

steps.title: One-Click Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Set up a CI/CD pipeline so that every push to main automatically deploys to your hosting provider.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests and deploys the application to Vercel upon push to main.

pro_tips: Focus on 'boring' B2B problems; they are less competitive and have higher willingness-to-pay than consumer apps.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write; it keeps your repo professional for potential future acquisition.
Prioritize Stripe's customer portal for subscription management to reduce your customer support overhead to near zero.
Implement a 'Build in Public' dashboard using your own tool to create social proof and attract early adopters.
Keep your tech stack minimal; the more dependencies you add, the higher the maintenance cost for your passive income stream.
content.next_steps: Once your first tool is live, spend 30 minutes a day on 'micro-marketing'—sharing your build process on platforms like X or LinkedIn to drive your first 10 customers.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for others and start building your own empire. The tools are ready, the workflow is proven, and your passive income journey starts with a single commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
